location: Inside a chest on a troll-drawn carriage traveling the road west of Waypoint Ruins in Limgrave. Both trolls pulling it must be killed to stop the carriage before the chest can be opened.
tactics: The carriage keeps moving until both trolls are killed; they won't chase you off, so pick them off individually
Approach from Agheel Lake North or Agheel Lake South grace toward Waypoint Ruins to find the road the carriage travels
Once the carriage stops, climb onto the wagon bed and open the chest for the Greataxe
lore: An unrefined slab of iron shaped into an axe, favored by chieftains of the badlands. It's heavy enough that only genuinely strong hands can swing it, but a charged blow can flatten almost anything in its path.

builds.name: Starting Strength build
builds.why: Straightforward D/D scaling two-hander that's easy to find right at the start of the game for a Strength character.

builds.name: Barbaric Roar bruiser
builds.why: Default skill boosts attack rating by 10% and adds combo hits to heavy attacks.
